title: Y@hovah #3070
definition:
Jehovah-jireh = "Jehovah sees"

 1) symbolic name given by Abraham to Mount Moriah in commemoration
    of the interposition of the angel of Jehovah who prevented the
    sacrifice of Isaac and provided a substitute
